sentEmails.subject: 🚗 EliteDrive: Booking Pending Approval - Honda Civic
sentEmails.html:
⚡ ELITEDRIVE

Booking Pending Approval

Dear Lucy Henry,

We are excited to let you know that your booking request has been successfully received by EliteDrive Pakistan.

Our team is currently reviewing your application, driver profile, and required credentials. Below are your booking details:

Booking ID b1783005021363
Vehicle Honda Civic (Sedan)
Duration 2026-07-02T15:09:21.582Z to 2026-07-02T16:09:21.582Z
Total Price PKR 1,440
Security Deposit PKR 10,000 (Refundable)
Payment Status PENDING (transfer)

If you selected **Bank Transfer**, please ensure you upload your payment receipt in the portal to expedite the verification process.

Go to My Bookings

If you have any questions or require immediate assistance, feel free to reply to this email or reach out via our 24/7 Live Support Chat.

Best regards,
The EliteDrive Team
